source_quote: No death counts or effect estimates (OR/RR/HR) for all-cause death are reported in the paper. Death is mentioned only as a censoring event for technique survival and time-to-admission analyses.

outcome: All-cause annual hospital admission rate (number of admissions/patient-year)

raw_data.note: HHD vs IHD vs PD per protocol. Medians with IQR reported, not means with SD. p<0.001 for both HHD/IHD and HHD/PD comparisons.
HHD vs IHD vs PD per protocol. Medians with IQR reported, not means with SD. p<0.001 for both HHD/IHD and HHD/PD comparisons.

Sildenafil/CC group (Group 2) vs control group (Group 3). Total side effects: Group 2 had 3 headache + 2 flushing + 6 blurring vision + 7 GIT upset = 18; Group 3 had 1 headache + 2 flushing + 2 blurring vision + 1 GIT upset = 6. Group 1 (estrogen/CC) had 5+3+0+4=12/48. Overall p=0.231. If only vasodilator-specific (headache+flushing): Group 1: 8/48, Group 2: 5/50, Group 3: 3/50.

One-year survival rate not explicitly reported. Median OS was 236 days (CI: 71-401) for DTIC alone (n=19), 419 days (CI: 80-758) for DTIC+metformin (n=18), and 422 days (CI: 344-499) for DTIC+melatonin (n=20). p=0.712 for OS comparison.

source_quote: Median OS was 236, 422, and 419 days, respectively (p = .712).

outcome: Tumour complete response rate (CR) defined by RECIST (long term)

raw_data.note: CR by RECIST 1.1. DTIC alone: 0/19 (0%), DTIC+melatonin: 1/20 (5%), DTIC+metformin: 0/18 (0%). One patient in melatonin group achieved CR after 12th cycle maintained for 32+ months.

source_quote: Response Assessment CR n = 0 (0%) [Control]; Response Assessment CR n = 0 (0%) [DTIC+Metformin]; Response Assessment CR n = 1 (5%) [DTIC+Melatonin]

outcome: Tumour partial response rate (PR) defined by RECIST (long term)

raw_data.note: PR by RECIST 1.1. DTIC alone: 2/19 (11%), DTIC+melatonin: 0/20 (0%), DTIC+metformin: 1/18 (5%). Overall ORR was 7% and did not differ among the treatment groups.

source_quote: Response Assessment PR n = 2 (11%) [Control]; Response Assessment PR n = 1 (5%) [DTIC+Metformin]; Response Assessment PR n = 0 (0%) [DTIC+Melatonin]
